scene.message: Mark: Man, this is a shock.{nl} You use a Persona too, huh.{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...What?{nl} You lot are the same...?{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...What's that{nl} supposed to mean?{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: This place looks alike,{nl} but it's not our world.{waitkey}Do you understand?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: A child in white...?{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: {wait_fr:60}Something{nl} precious...{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{wait_fr:30}...{wait_fr:30}...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: That idiot...{waitkey}{ret}
Is there someone{nl} precious to you?{ctl0e:28}{ret}
You've got secrets too,{nl} don't you?{ctl0e:29}{ret}
As long as now is good,{nl} that's fine, right?{ctl0e:27}{ret}
Ayase: ...{wait_fr:60}Knew it, right!{nl} We click, {ctl0f:1}.{waitkey}{ret}
Student: That guy's called{nl} Kido? He's so cool...{waitkey}{ret}
